ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Continued To Jun-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 30, 2022 is admitted to probate. William Eugene Powell is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $2,076,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 30, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone. Not reported.
